channel.title: Police on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Police on Gajab Jobs

item.title: MP Police Band Bharti 2026 Online Form
item.description: MP Police Band Constable Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 679 posts under the Madhya Pradesh Police Department. This recruitment is open for male candidates who have passed 10th class and possess knowledge of band or musical instruments. The application process will begin on 05 April 2026 and will end on 19 April 2026 via the MP Online portal. Candidates should review the official notification before applying.
